title: Making Kick-Ass Liam Neeson Movies With Director Jaume Collet-Serra
format: Sean Fennessey talks with director Jaume Collet-Serra about The Commuter, his fourth film with Liam Neeson, and why he keeps building thrillers inside confined spaces.

films.title: The Commuter
films.note: The new one, set almost entirely on a train. Neeson's commuter has to find one passenger carrying dangerous information; his years of routine turn out to be the superpower.

films.title: Non-Stop
films.note: The earlier Neeson-on-a-vehicle thriller, set on a plane. Collet-Serra contrasts the plane's tension with the train, where he could stage scenes other passengers never notice.

films.title: The Shallows
films.note: His shark thriller, which he calls the hardest of these confined-space shoots.
